member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings
member.summary: Represents the validated settings available to the running application.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings.Features
member.summary: Gets or initializes application-wide feature-presentation settings.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings.Logging
member.summary: Gets or initializes the logging settings.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings.Ai
member.summary: Gets or initializes the optional local AI-provider settings.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings.Catalog
member.summary: Gets or initializes settings for the opt-in local results catalog.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings.Content
member.summary: Gets or initializes bounded local content-extraction settings.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings.SemanticSearch
member.summary: Gets or initializes local Semantic Search Beta settings.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings.WithShellFeatureSwitches(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a settings snapshot with only the two shell-wide feature switches changed. All detailed provider, capability, catalog, and logging values are preserved.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings.WithFilesPageDetailsPanelWidthRatio(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a settings snapshot with only the Files-page details-panel proportion changed.
member.param: The validated proportion of available Files-page width assigned to details.
member.returns: A settings snapshot that preserves every unrelated value.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings.Validate
member.summary: Validates settings before they are made available to the application.
member.exception: Thrown when a required settings group is missing.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.SemanticSearchSettings
member.summary: Defines bounded local deterministic Semantic Search Beta behavior.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.SemanticSearchSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether local semantic indexing and navigation are enabled.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.SemanticSearchSettings.MaximumDocumentCount
member.summary: Gets or initializes the maximum indexed-document count.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.SemanticSearchSettings.MaximumResultCount
member.summary: Gets or initializes the maximum displayed result count.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.SemanticSearchSettings.Validate
member.summary: Validates local semantic-search bounds.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings
member.summary: Defines bounded local metadata extraction and OCR Beta behavior.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.MetadataExtractionEnabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether defensive local metadata and native-text extraction runs after scanning.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.OcrEnabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether local OCR Beta may run.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.OcrOnlyWhenNativeTextUnavailable
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether OCR is skipped when reliable native text is available.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.MaximumPagesPerDocument
member.summary: Gets or initializes the maximum supported document pages.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.MaximumFileSizeMiB
member.summary: Gets or initializes the maximum input size in mebibytes.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.OcrLanguage
member.summary: Gets or initializes the local OCR language identifier.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.MaximumOcrDurationSeconds
member.summary: Gets or initializes the maximum OCR duration per file.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.PdfRasterizationDpi
member.summary: Gets or initializes PDF rasterization resolution used for local OCR.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.MaximumRasterDimension
member.summary: Gets or initializes the maximum width or height of a rendered OCR page.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.MaximumOcrTextCharacters
member.summary: Gets or initializes the maximum combined OCR text retained per document.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.MaximumTemporaryStorageMiB
member.summary: Gets or initializes the temporary page-image budget per document in mebibytes.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.TesseractExecutablePath
member.summary: Gets or initializes an optional absolute Tesseract executable path; null uses PATH.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.BackgroundProcessingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether content extraction may continue outside the immediate scan stage.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ContentSettings.Validate
member.summary: Validates bounded content settings.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.FeatureSettings
member.summary: Defines application-wide interface-complexity choices independently from AI enablement.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.FeatureSettings.DefaultFilesPageDetailsPanelWidthRatio
member.summary: Gets the default proportion of Files-page width assigned to selected-file details.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.FeatureSettings.MinimumFilesPageDetailsPanelWidthRatio
member.summary: Gets the smallest supported Files-page details-panel proportion.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.FeatureSettings.MaximumFilesPageDetailsPanelWidthRatio
member.summary: Gets the largest supported Files-page details-panel proportion.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.FeatureSettings.ShowAdvancedFeatures
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether specialist and troubleshooting features are shown.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.FeatureSettings.FilesPageDetailsPanelWidthRatio
member.summary: Gets or initializes the proportion of available Files-page width assigned to selected-file details.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.FeatureSettings.Validate
member.summary: Validates bounded interface-presentation settings.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiCapability
member.summary: Identifies an independently enabled AI capability.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiCapability.FileRenameSuggestions
member.summary: Review-only suggestions for one known file name.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiCapability.FolderStructureSuggestions
member.summary: Review-only logical folder hierarchies for known file metadata.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiCapability.DocumentTextInterpretation
member.summary: Review-only interpretation of bounded locally extracted document text.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.CatalogSettings
member.summary: Defines user control over the bounded, application-owned local results catalog.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.CatalogSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether completed display-safe scan snapshots may be stored in OpenSorSe application data.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.CatalogSettings.Validate
member.summary: Validates catalog settings reserved for future compatible expansion.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings
member.summary: Defines the optional, user-controlled local Ollama integration settings.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.MaximumModelIdentifierLength
member.summary: Gets the maximum supported model identifier length.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.MinimumRequestTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Gets the minimum supported finite request timeout.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.MaximumRequestTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Gets the maximum supported finite request timeout.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether AI suggestion requests are permitted.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.FileRenameSuggestionsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether review-only file-rename suggestions are enabled.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.FolderStructureSuggestionsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether review-only folder-structure suggestions are enabled.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.RequestDiagnosticsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes opt-in, session-only raw AI request diagnostics.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.Endpoint
member.summary: Gets or initializes the Ollama-compatible endpoint. The default is the local Ollama endpoint.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.SelectedModel
member.summary: Gets or initializes the locally discovered model selected for suggestion requests.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.RequestTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Gets or initializes the bounded duration permitted for one AI request.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.PreferenceAdaptationEnabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether locally recorded approved patterns may be supplied as concise request context.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.DocumentTextInterpretationEnabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether explicit requests may send bounded extracted text to the configured provider.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.IsCapabilityEnabled(OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiCapability)
member.summary: Gets whether the master switch and the specified capability switch are both enabled.
member.param: The capability to evaluate.
member.returns: only when the capability may be considered for use.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.AiSettings.Validate
member.summary: Validates the supported local AI configuration values.
member.exception: Thrown when the settings are unsafe or unsupported.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.LoggingSettings
member.summary: Defines logging-related application settings.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.LoggingSettings.MinimumLevel
member.summary: Gets or initializes the lowest severity that is written to configured log outputs.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.LoggingSettings.FileLoggingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or initializes whether local daily text logging is enabled.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.LoggingSettings.LogDirectoryPath
member.summary: Gets or initializes the optional absolute directory for local daily log files.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.LoggingSettings.RetainedFileCount
member.summary: Gets or initializes the number of daily log files retained locally.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.LoggingSettings.Validate
member.summary: Validates logging-specific settings.
member.exception: Thrown when a logging setting is invalid.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ConfigurationLimits
member.summary: Defines fixed bounds for OpenSorSe-owned configuration persistence.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ConfigurationLimits.MaximumSettingsFileBytes
member.summary: Gets the maximum encoded size of the complete settings file.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ConfigurationValidationException
member.summary: Represents an invalid application configuration value.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ConfigurationValidationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A description of the invalid configuration.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ConfigurationValidationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a configuration validation exception with a non-user-facing underlying failure.
member.param: The user-safe validation message.
The underlying configuration failure.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.IConfigurationService
member.summary: Loads, validates, exposes, and persists application configuration.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.IConfigurationService.Current
member.summary: Gets the current validated settings.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.IConfigurationService.InitializationWarning
member.summary: Gets a user-safe warning when owned settings could not be loaded and defaults were activated.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.IConfigurationService.InitializeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads settings from their configured sources and validates the result.
member.param: A token that cancels loading before completion.
member.returns: A task that completes when settings are ready for use.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.IConfigurationService.SaveAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists the current settings to the user configuration file.
member.param: A token that cancels saving before completion.
member.returns: A task that completes when settings have been persisted.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.IConfigurationService.SaveAsync(OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.ApplicationSettings,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates and persists replacement application settings to the configured user settings file.
member.param: The replacement settings to persist.
A token that cancels saving before completion.
member.returns: A task that completes when the replacement settings have been persisted.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.JsonConfigurationService
member.summary: Loads JSON user settings over safe defaults and applies environment overrides.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.JsonConfigurationService.#ctor(System.String,System.Func{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a configuration service for a user settings file.
member.param: The absolute path of the user settings file.
An optional environment variable reader for testing.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry
member.summary: Provides centralized discovery of shared services registered during application composition.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry.GetRequiredService``1
member.summary: Gets a required registered service.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.DependencyInjection.IServiceRegistry.IsRegistered``1
member.summary: Determines whether a service has been registered.
member.typeparam: The service type to look up.
member.returns: when the service is available; otherwise, .

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.DependencyInjection.OpenSorSeCoreOptions
member.summary: Defines composition settings required to register the shared Core foundation.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.DependencyInjection.OpenSorSeCoreOptions.ConfigurationFilePath
member.summary: Gets or initializes the absolute path of the user settings file.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Registers the shared Core infrastructure with the .NET dependency injection container.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddOpenSorSeCore(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,OpenSorSe.Core.DependencyInjection.OpenSorSeCoreOptions)
member.summary: Adds the documented shared Core foundation as singleton services.
member.param: The application service collection.
The composition settings for Core infrastructure.
member.returns: The same collection to support fluent composition.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceRegistry
member.summary: Adapts the .NET dependency injection provider to the Core service registry contract.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.DependencyInjection.ServiceRegistry.#ctor(System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a registry over the composed application service provider.
member.param: The application service provider.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationError
member.summary: Contains diagnostics for an error reported through the shared error handler.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationError.#ctor(System.String,System.String,OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationErrorSeverity,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes an application error.
member.param: The subsystem that reported the error.
A user-safe description of the failure.
The impact of the failure.
The optional underlying exception.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationError.Source
member.summary: Gets the subsystem that reported the error.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationError.Message
member.summary: Gets the user-safe error message.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationError.Severity
member.summary: Gets the error impact.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationError.Exception
member.summary: Gets the optional underlying exception.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationErrorSeverity
member.summary: Describes the impact of an application error.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationErrorSeverity.Information
member.summary: A non-critical diagnostic condition.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationErrorSeverity.Warning
member.summary: A recoverable unexpected condition.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationErrorSeverity.Error
member.summary: A failed operation that allows the application to continue.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationErrorSeverity.Critical
member.summary: A failure that prevents safe continuation.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ErrorHandler
member.summary: Logs application errors and exposes them to interested presentation components.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ErrorHandler.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService)
member.summary: Initializes an error handler that uses centralized logging.
member.param: The logging service used for diagnostic output.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler
member.summary: Reports cross-cutting application errors without implementing user notifications.

member.name: E:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler.ErrorReported
member.summary: Occurs after an error is reported.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.IErrorHandler.Report(OpenSorSe.Core.Errors.ApplicationError)
member.summary: Records and broadcasts an application error.
member.param: The error to report.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Events.EventBus
member.summary: Provides in-memory publish-subscribe event delivery with isolated subscriber failures.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Events.EventBus.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService)
member.summary: Initializes an event bus that reports subscriber failures through centralized logging.
member.param: The central logging service.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Events.IApplicationEvent
member.summary: Marks an immutable occurrence that can be published through the application event bus.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Events.IEventBus
member.summary: Delivers application events to independent subscribers.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Events.IEventBus.Subscribe``1(System.Func{``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Registers an asynchronous handler for an event type.
member.typeparam: The immutable event type to observe.
member.param: The handler to invoke for each published event.
member.returns: A subscription that removes the handler when disposed.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Events.IEventBus.PublishAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes an event to all current subscribers.
member.param: The event that has occurred.
A token that cancels delivery before the next handler.
member.returns: A task that completes when all handlers have been offered the event.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Lifecycle.ApplicationHost
member.summary: Coordinates configuration, logging, and lifecycle state for the shared application foundation.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Lifecycle.ApplicationHost.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Configuration.IConfigurationService,OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService,OpenSorSe.Core.State.IApplicationState)
member.summary: Initializes an application host.
member.param: The configuration service to initialize first.
The centralized logging service.
The lifecycle state store.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Lifecycle.IApplicationHost
member.summary: Coordinates Core infrastructure startup and graceful shutdown.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Lifecycle.IApplicationHost.InitializeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initializes shared Core services in the documented lifecycle order.
member.param: A token that cancels startup before completion.
member.returns: A task that completes when the application enters the running state.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Lifecycle.IApplicationHost.ShutdownAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Shuts down shared Core services in a controlled order.
member.param: A token that cancels shutdown before completion.
member.returns: A task that completes when the application reaches the stopped state.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.DiagnosticEvent
member.summary: Represents one bounded, process-session diagnostic event suitable for user-facing inspection.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.DiagnosticEvent.#ctor(System.Int64,System.DateTimeOffset,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents one bounded, process-session diagnostic event suitable for user-facing inspection.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.DiagnosticEventLimits
member.summary: Defines fixed bounds for inspectable process-session diagnostics.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.DiagnosticEventLimits.MaximumRetainedEvents
member.summary: Maximum number of recent events retained in memory.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.DiagnosticEventLimits.MaximumSummaryLength
member.summary: Maximum user-facing event summary length.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.DiagnosticEventLimits.MaximumExceptionSummaryLength
member.summary: Maximum safe exception-summary length.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService
member.summary: Configures centralized logging and creates categorized loggers for application modules.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService.Initialize(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel)
member.summary: Initializes logging with the supplied minimum severity.
member.param: The lowest severity to write to log outputs.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService.Initialize(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingOptions)
member.summary: Initializes logging with explicit local-output options.
member.param: The validated minimum level and local sink options.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService.CreateLogger(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a logger for the supplied category.
member.param: The subsystem or type name used to categorize entries.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService.GetStatistics
member.summary: Gets process-lifetime logging counters without retaining log entry payloads.
member.returns: A snapshot of accepted entries and file-sink failures.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService.GetRecentEvents
member.summary: Gets a newest-first snapshot of bounded process-session diagnostic events.
member.returns: Immutable events safe for ordinary diagnostic inspection.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingLimits
member.summary: Defines fixed capacity bounds for application-owned diagnostic output.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingLimits.MaximumDailyFileBytes
member.summary: Gets the maximum encoded size of one UTC daily diagnostic log.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingOptions
member.summary: Defines validated local-output options for the centralized logging service.
member.param: The lowest severity emitted to configured log providers.
Whether the local daily file sink is enabled.
The optional absolute directory for daily log files.
The number of daily log files to retain.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingOptions.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Defines validated local-output options for the centralized logging service.
member.param: The lowest severity emitted to configured log providers.
Whether the local daily file sink is enabled.
The optional absolute directory for daily log files.
The number of daily log files to retain.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingOptions.MinimumLevel
member.summary: The lowest severity emitted to configured log providers.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingOptions.FileLoggingEnabled
member.summary: Whether the local daily file sink is enabled.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingOptions.LogDirectoryPath
member.summary: The optional absolute directory for daily log files.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingOptions.RetainedFileCount
member.summary: The number of daily log files to retain.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingOptions.Default
member.summary: Gets the conservative v0.1 default local logging options.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingOptions.ResolvedLogDirectoryPath
member.summary: Gets the resolved absolute directory for daily log files.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingOptions.Validate
member.summary: Validates the local logging contract before replacing configured providers.
member.exception: Thrown when an option is invalid.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingService
member.summary: Provides a centrally configured debug logging factory for application modules.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingStatistics
member.summary: Contains process-lifetime counts of entries accepted by the centralized logging service.
member.param: The number of emitted Trace entries.
The number of emitted Debug entries.
The number of emitted Information entries.
The number of emitted Warning entries.
The number of emitted Error entries.
The number of emitted Critical entries.
The number of isolated local file-sink failures.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingStatistics.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Contains process-lifetime counts of entries accepted by the centralized logging service.
member.param: The number of emitted Trace entries.
The number of emitted Debug entries.
The number of emitted Information entries.
The number of emitted Warning entries.
The number of emitted Error entries.
The number of emitted Critical entries.
The number of isolated local file-sink failures.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingStatistics.TraceEntries
member.summary: The number of emitted Trace entries.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingStatistics.DebugEntries
member.summary: The number of emitted Debug entries.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingStatistics.InformationEntries
member.summary: The number of emitted Information entries.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingStatistics.WarningEntries
member.summary: The number of emitted Warning entries.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingStatistics.ErrorEntries
member.summary: The number of emitted Error entries.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingStatistics.CriticalEntries
member.summary: The number of emitted Critical entries.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingStatistics.FileWriteFailures
member.summary: The number of isolated local file-sink failures.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.LoggingStatistics.Empty
member.summary: Gets an empty process-lifetime statistics snapshot.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleState
member.summary: Describes the lifecycle stage of the running application.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleState.Starting
member.summary: The executable has started but infrastructure is not ready.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleState.Initializing
member.summary: Core infrastructure is being initialized.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleState.Running
member.summary: The application is ready to accept normal work.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleState.ShuttingDown
member.summary: The application is releasing resources and stopping work.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleState.Stopped
member.summary: The application has completed shutdown.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleStateChangedEventArgs
member.summary: Supplies the previous and current values of an application lifecycle transition.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleStateChangedEventArgs.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleState,OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleState)
member.summary: Initializes lifecycle transition event data.
member.param: The state before the transition.
The state after the transition.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleStateChangedEventArgs.PreviousState
member.summary: Gets the state before the transition.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleStateChangedEventArgs.CurrentState
member.summary: Gets the state after the transition.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationState
member.summary: Stores and validates application lifecycle state transitions.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.State.IApplicationState
member.summary: Provides the authoritative, in-memory state of the application lifecycle.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.State.IApplicationState.LifecycleState
member.summary: Gets the current application lifecycle state.

member.name: E:OpenSorSe.Core.State.IApplicationState.LifecycleStateChanged
member.summary: Occurs after a valid lifecycle transition.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.State.IApplicationState.TryTransitionTo(OpenSorSe.Core.State.ApplicationLifecycleState)
member.summary: Attempts a valid transition to a new lifecycle state.
member.param: The requested lifecycle state.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskSnapshot
member.summary: Provides an immutable view of a managed background operation.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskSnapshot.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskStatus,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a snapshot of a managed background operation.
member.param: The unique task identifier.
The descriptive operation name.
The current task status.
The optional normalized progress value.
The optional failure that stopped the operation.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskSnapshot.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique task identifier.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskSnapshot.Name
member.summary: Gets the descriptive operation name.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskSnapshot.Status
member.summary: Gets the current task status.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskSnapshot.Progress
member.summary: Gets the normalized progress value when it has been reported.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskSnapshot.Failure
member.summary: Gets the failure that ended the operation, if any.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskStatus
member.summary: Describes the lifecycle status of a managed background operation.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskStatus.Pending
member.summary: The operation is registered but has not started.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskStatus.Running
member.summary: The operation is currently executing.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskStatus.Completed
member.summary: The operation completed successfully.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: The operation stopped after cancellation was requested.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.BackgroundTaskStatus.Failed
member.summary: The operation ended because of an unhandled failure.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.ITaskManager
member.summary: Coordinates non-blocking background operations, progress reporting, and cancellation.

member.name: P:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.ITaskManager.ActiveTasks
member.summary: Gets snapshots of operations that are currently pending or running.

member.name: E:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.ITaskManager.TaskChanged
member.summary: Occurs when a managed task changes status or reports progress.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.ITaskManager.RunAsync(System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.IProgress{System.Double},System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs an operation on the thread pool and tracks its lifecycle.
member.param: A descriptive task name.
The work to execute.
A token that can cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task containing the final operation snapshot.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.ITaskManager.TryCancel(System.Guid)
member.summary: Requests cancellation for an active operation.
member.param: The task to cancel.
member.returns: when a task was active and cancellation was requested.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.TaskManager
member.summary: Tracks independent background operations without owning their business logic.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.Core.Tasks.TaskManager.#ctor(OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService)
member.summary: Initializes a task manager that reports task failures through centralized logging.
member.param: The logging service used for task diagnostics.
